questions.question: What would break if `customer.file_accounts_customer_customer_proto_rawDescGZIP` changed?
questions.why: customer.file_accounts_customer_customer_proto_rawDescGZIP has 122 total edges — it's a critical hub. Changes propagate widely.

questions.question: Should `gRPC A/B Experiment Service Handlers and Metadata Enforcement` be split into smaller, more focused modules?
questions.why: Community has 137 nodes — large communities often hide multiple concerns.

questions.question: Why is `toRackCsvDto` highly connected but not assigned to any community?
questions.why: High-edge nodes without community assignment reduce graph comprehension quality. Run `build(action='pipeline')` to enrich.
